cities.name: Warsaw
cities.notes: Meticulously rebuilt Royal Castle, WWII uprising museum and Neon Museum

cities.name: Krakow
cities.notes: Wawel Castle, Kazimierz Jewish quarter, Auschwitz day trip and pierogi

cities.name: Gdansk
cities.notes: Colorful Hanseatic merchant houses, amber jewellery and old shipyard

cities.name: Wroclaw
cities.notes: Island city with 100+ bridges, Market Square dwarfs and nightlife

cities.name: Zakopane
cities.notes: Tatra mountain resort with oscypek cheese, hiking and Kasprowy Wierch
